cad_masters.notes: Parametric shell + soundboard envelope + tongue position/length layout reference marks (V1 Cylinder/Flat Top, Standard 16in). Renders clean. Does not model slit-routing cut geometry or gu port placement.
Current dimensional authority (190-formula parametric workbook); unmeasured, not build-ready until Phase 1 calibration.

notes: OpenSCAD source is a planning envelope layered on top of the design-table authority; no STEP/SolidWorks export yet (cad/README.md: SolidWorks deferred until Phase 1 measurements are folded back into the workbook). Gate A (Alpha workspace compile) not yet run.
